title: OKF+ / GKOS shared definitions
description: Shared vocabulary for GKOS schema program. Enumerations are frozen per GKOS-2026-07-20 v0.76 (epistemic vocabulary, GKOS Master Standard) and grounded in the OKF+ 2.3 reference implementation (gkos-engine v1.0.5, src/okf23.ts, src/types.ts).

uid.description: Stable identity: UUID (v4 accepted, v7 preferred) or policy-permitted namespaced id. Filenames and paths are not identity.

timestamp.description: Timezone-aware ISO 8601 instant. Zulu or numeric offset; naive wall-clock time is non-conforming.

epistemicState.description: Twelve-state vocabulary frozen in GKOS v0.76 §6.1.

sensitivity.description: Seven-level sensitivity ladder. Missing or invalid values MUST fail closed to a restricted deployment default.

origin.description: Four-way origin separation. `approved` requires a corroborating Decision Record; it cannot be fabricated by authoring the word.

wikilinkOrUid.description: Relation/lineage target: uid (rename-proof standalone convention) or whole-value quoted wikilink (Obsidian convention).

actorIdentity.description: Proposer/decider identity. Free-form pending the v0.8 actor-identity model; the shapes below are the reference implementation's convention.
